  1. org.jscience.core.measure.quantity

Uses of Interface
org.jscience.core.measure.quantity.Time

Packages that use Time
Package
Description
org.jscience.core.measure
Implements a comprehensive units framework enabling type-safe
org.jscience.core.measure.quantity
Defines interfaces for physical quantities, organized by
org.jscience.core.measure.units
 
org.jscience.natural.earth.geophysics
 
org.jscience.natural.earth.seismology
 
org.jscience.natural.engineering.control
 
org.jscience.natural.engineering.electrical
 
org.jscience.natural.medicine.epidemiology
 
org.jscience.natural.medicine.pharmacology
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.astronomy
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.astronomy.mechanics
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.classical.mechanics
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.loaders
 
org.jscience.natural.physics.nuclear
 
org.jscience.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
org.jscience.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
org.jscience.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.jscience.social.history
- historical events, timelines, and chronology.
org.jscience.social.history.clock
Provides the org.jscience.social.history.time module.
org.jscience.social.history.time
Temporal coordinate and interval support for historical analysis.
org.jscience.social.politics
Provides the org.jscience.social.politics module.
org.jscience.social.psychology
Provides the org.jscience.social.psychology module.
org.jscience.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.

    Units.WEEK

    AstronomyConstants.GAUSSIAN_YEAR
    Gaussian year (period of ideal particle in circular orbit).
    static final Quantity<Time>
    AstronomyConstants.JULIAN_YEAR
    Standard Julian year (exactly 365.25 days).
    static final Quantity<Time>
    AstronomyConstants.SIDEREAL_DAY
    Sideral day (rotation of Earth relative to fixed stars).
    static final Quantity<Time>
    AstronomyConstants.SIDEREAL_YEAR
    Sidereal year (orbital period relative to fixed stars).
    static final Quantity<Time>
    AstronomyConstants.TROPICAL_YEAR
    Tropical year (period between successive vernal equinoxes).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Hohmann transfer time (half the period of transfer orbit).

    Kepler's Third Law: Orbital period from semi-major axis.

    OrbitalMechanics.orbitalPeriodEarth(Real semiMajorAxis)
    Orbital period for Earth-orbiting satellite.
    static Quantity<Time>
    OrbitalMechanics.synodicPeriod(Real period1, Real period2)
    Synodic period between two orbiting bodies. 1/T_syn = |1/T1 - 1/T2|

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    ReactionTimeAnalysis.fittsLaw(Quantity<Time> a, Quantity<Time> b, Quantity<Length> d, Quantity<Length> w)

    Models decision time based on the number of choices using Hick's Law.
